content.en:
Ten thousand threads of extra-dimensional rule realm, what kind of probability is this, has reached the minimum requirement for impacting the third realm.

Although it is said that if you hit the third realm, there are very few second realms that can meet this requirement, take the second realm of the six thousand realms as an example, among so many second realms, only the heads of those powerful forces who have reached the transcendent rule realm have reached more than one realm.

For example, at the beginning, the patriarch of the Six-Winged Family, the Golden Winged Realm Lord, the President of the Jialan Chamber of Commerce, and the Treasure Refining Building, these extra-dimensional rules of the second realm were only above one point realm.

Most of the extradimensional realms of the second realm will never be able to comprehend the extradimensional rules above one realm.

After coming out of the Red Dragon Yuan, Ye Tian did not immediately go in.

If he entered in a short period of time, the second realm of other extradimensional forces would know about it, and he would definitely be very puzzled.

After all, once you stay in the Red Dragon Yuan for a long time, your body will inevitably be damaged, and it will definitely take some years to heal, and you will definitely not go in again in a short time.

So.

Ye Tian was ready to wait for two or three more extradimensional epochs before entering the Red Dragon Abyss.

In the next two multi-dimensional eras, Ye Tian did not try to comprehend the extradimensional rules, but worked hard to improve his cultivation.

For the second realm, the super-dimensional rules are important, but cultivation is also important.29 If the cultivation cannot reach the peak of the second realm, even if the super-dimensional rule realm is high, it is not qualified to impact the third realm.

Occasionally, he researched the black statue, but there were still no clues.

After two multi-dimensional eras, Ye Tian came to the Red Dragon Yuan again.

Many forces had been watching Chilongyuan, and when they saw Ye Tian coming again, they were all shocked.

After all, many of the existences of the second realm will only enter the Red Dragon Abyss once again after a long interval, and the reason is naturally not to heal, but to maximize the benefits of this opportunity.

There is a bottleneck in comprehending the extra-dimensional rules, if you enter the Red Dragon Abyss nine times in a short period of time, and then you can't enter it again, in that case, the super-dimensional rule realm will not improve too much, and if it falls into a bottleneck in the later stage, it will be difficult to continue to improve.

Therefore, many of the existence of the second realm usually comprehend the extradimensional rules, and after falling into a bottleneck, they will enter the Red Dragon Yuan to comprehend for a period of time, so as to break the bottleneck of the extradimensional rules.

In this way, we can maximize the benefits of this opportunity.

"Another fool who was attracted by the rapid improvement of the extradimensional rules, he didn't even have any control, he wasted this opportunity, and the future fell into a bottleneck, and there was no second such free opportunity in the Six Thousand Territory!"

A second realm knew that Ye Tian had entered the Red Dragon Abyss for the second time in a short period of time, and sneered.

If he knew Ye Tian's progress speed and talent, he would never dare to mock Ye Tian like this.

......

After entering the Red Dragon Abyss for the second time, Ye Tian continued to comprehend the rules of the extradimensional dimension.

This time, the effect of the comprehension is slightly worse than the last time, after all, the higher the realm of the extra-dimensional rules, the more difficult it is to improve, plus the comprehension is the same Tricky Wood Red Dragon scale, the effect will naturally not be too good.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian's extradimensional rules were still rapidly improving.

Several extradimensional epochs have passed, and Ye Tian's replicating body can't hold on again.

So, he went out.

This time, his progress was a little smaller, but it was still terrifying for other extradimensional realms.

"Two thousand five hundred extradimensional rules, the progress is not bad!"

Ye Tian smiled.

In addition, he tried to create a superdimensional supernatural power during this period of time, after all, one superdimensional supernatural power was still not enough, and he successfully created a second superdimensional supernatural power - superdimensional void escape.

This super-dimensional supernatural power is an excellent super-dimensional escape technique for speed and escape, and it can also be used in battle, which is quite good for improving strength.

In the following days, Ye Tian would enter the Red Dragon Abyss every few extradimensional epochs, constantly contemplating the scales of the Tricky Wood Red Dragon.

In this way, unconsciously, more than twenty extradimensional epochs have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian's super-dimensional rule realm had reached more than six thousand three hundred threads, and such an improvement speed was terrifying.

"It's not good, run away!"

The existence of the second realm was taken aback, where did he dare to comprehend, and tried to escape as quickly as possible, and some even used secret techniques that hurt themselves, just to be able to leave the Red Dragon Abyss.

Ye Tian didn't panic, but the other extra-dimensional realms had fled, so he naturally had to flee too, otherwise it would be too strange.

But then, he found himself locked in.

What's even more strange is that the other extradimensional realms have all managed to escape, and only he remains here. []

Rumble!!!!

The pupils of the Tricky Wood Red Dragon opened, and a pair of strange blood-colored pupils stared at Ye Tian.

The Tricky Wood Red Dragon has awakened!!!

"Tricky Wood Red Dragon!"

Ye Tian's body seemed to be crushed by a terrifying force, and the aura of this Tricky Wood Red Dragon was many times stronger than him, more than ten thousand times.

However, the other party could have killed himself in seconds, but he didn't kill himself.

"Little guy, you've consumed a lot of my extradimensional rule origin!"

The Tricky Wood Red Dragon spoke.

"What?" Ye Tian pretended to be confused.

Tricky Wood Red Dragon continued: "Your comprehension is terrifying, and the progress of the extra-dimensional rules is too fast, but your rapid improvement of your super-dimensional rule realm is also equivalent to consuming my extra-dimensional rule origin. Your consumption is already comparable to the consumption of dozens of Second Realm Extradimensional Realms. My extra-dimensional origin rule consumption of 980 is in a balance with recovery, and if you break this balance, if I keep contemplating, my extra-dimensional rule origin will consume a lot, which is not good for me. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

This Tricky Wood Red Dragon maintained the special effect of that scale, which was equivalent to consuming the origin of the extradimensional rules all the time, and after he came to comprehend, the consumption became larger, and he could not recover in time.

So, this tricky wood red dragon woke up.

"Senior Trick Wood Red Dragon, why don't you kill me?"

Ye Tian asked suspiciously.

The Tricky Wood Red Dragon smiled and said, "It's very simple, I want to make a deal with you. Your potential is very high, not comparable to those waste materials, the real limit of those waste materials is the ordinary third realm, and it depends on luck and chance, but you are different, your limit is at least the fourth realm. My request is very simple, after you reach the fourth realm in the future, let me go, how about it?"

"Let you go, ......"

Ye Tian was taken aback.

"That's right, I've been sealed, it's just that your cultivation is too low to see the seal. I consume the origin of the extradimensional rules all the time, and I also attract you, the extradimensional realms of the second realm, to come over and find a partner to cooperate with, otherwise I will let you enlighten for nothing? It's a pity, all the waste materials that come are some waste, and I want to comprehend many times, that's looking for death!"

The Tricky Wood Red Dragon said coldly.
